home.heroLede: YUnited is a student club at the University of St. Gallen connecting students with roots from former Yugoslavia — and anyone curious about the culture — socially and professionally. Since 2013.
home.whoBody: From Prvi Maj barbecues to casino nights and career networks — YUnited hosts social and professional events that help students feel at home in St. Gallen and build friendships that last well beyond graduation.

events.heroLede: Brunches, barbecues, karaoke, casino nights and career events — this is what we get up to. Members get access to all events via uniclubs.
events.pastIntro: A look back at what we've done recently. Photos and stories also live on our Instagram.
events.emptyUpcoming: No upcoming events are scheduled right now — follow us on Instagram (@yunited.unisg) or check uniclubs to be first to hear about the next one.

about.heroLede: Fostering cultural exchange between students from former Yugoslavia at the University of St. Gallen — since 2013.
about.missionP1: YUnited connects students with roots from former Yugoslavia socially and professionally while fostering cultural exchange at the University of St. Gallen.
about.missionP2: We host a variety of social and professional events for students from ex-Yugoslav countries to aid in their personal and professional development during and after their studies at HSG — and everyone interested in the culture is welcome, whether or not your roots are in the region.
about.missionP3: Beyond campus, YUnited builds a network between students, supports their academic development, acts as a bridge to companies and organisations with an ex-Yugoslav background, and supports and promotes fundraising campaigns.
about.missionP4: Our buddy-system offers guidance for assessment and exchange students while fostering connections across all majors and semesters.
about.buddyHeading: Someone to ask, from day one
about.buddyLede: Starting at HSG is a lot at once — a new city, a new system, a lot of new people. Our buddy system pairs you with someone who has already been through it. It is open to every YUnited member, not only to students arriving on exchange.
about.buddyStudentsBody: Assessment-year students get a first point of contact for the things no handbook covers — how to plan a semester, which courses go well together, where to find things. It also connects students across majors and year groups, from assessment through to master's.
about.buddyExchangeBody: Here for a semester? Your buddy is a friendly first contact for questions about HSG and everyday life in St. Gallen — no Balkan roots required.
about.buddyMorePre: There is more detail on what we offer incoming and outgoing students on the
about.storyIntro: YUnited was founded in 2013 as the cultural club for students from the ex-Yugoslav region at HSG.
about.valueCommunityBody: A home away from home: friendships across all majors and semesters, from the Assessment year to Master's and beyond.
about.valueCultureBody: Keeping the food, music, humour and traditions of the region alive in St. Gallen — and sharing them with everyone who's curious.
about.valueCareersBody: Professional events and a bridge to companies and organisations with ex-Yugoslav roots, during your studies and after them.

members.heroLede: The people who keep YUnited running — organising events, building partnerships and welcoming new members every semester.
members.boardEmpty: The board for this semester is being confirmed. Check back shortly.
members.involvedBody: Members can help shape events, take on board roles and grow the community. Say hi at any event or drop us a line.

exchange.heroLede: Whether you're arriving at HSG for a semester or heading abroad yourself — here's how YUnited fits into your exchange.
exchange.incomingLede: Spending a semester in St. Gallen? You're warmly invited — no Balkan roots required.
exchange.incomingBuddy: Buddy-system: our buddy-system offers guidance for assessment and exchange students — a friendly first contact for questions about HSG and life in St. Gallen.
exchange.incomingEvents: Events: join our brunches, barbecues, karaoke and party nights from week one. Membership (via uniclubs) gives access to all events.
exchange.incomingHome: A taste of home: if your roots are in the region, we're a way to stay connected to the culture while abroad. If not, we're a fun way to discover it.
exchange.outgoingLede: Off on exchange — to Rotterdam, Vienna, Singapore or anywhere else? Here's the honest picture:
exchange.outgoingItem1: YUnited doesn't currently run a formal programme for students abroad.
exchange.outgoingItem2: Members often stay in the loop informally — follow @yunited.unisg to keep up with the community while you're away.
exchange.outgoingItem3Pre: Happy to share tips: if a YUnited member has studied at your destination, we'll gladly connect you — just

join.heroLede: Membership is handled entirely on uniclubs.ch — the official HSG club platform. Sign up there in a couple of minutes; this website is just here to tell you why it's worth it.
join.semesterBody: Access to all YUnited events for the semester: brunches, barbecues, karaoke, casino nights, career events and more.
join.freeBody: Not sure yet? The free option on uniclubs gives you access to the opening event so you can meet us first.
join.note: You'll need to sign in with your uniclubs account. Payment and membership administration all happen on uniclubs — we never handle it on this site.
join.questionsBody: Not sure if the club is for you, or want to know what's planned this semester? Just ask.

contact.heroLede: Questions about membership, events, partnerships or anything else — we're happy to hear from you.
contact.formSuccess: Thanks — your message is on its way to the board. We usually reply within a few days.
contact.formError: Please fill in all fields (with a valid email) before sending.
contact.formFallback: Sorry — sending failed. Please email us directly at yunited@shsg.ch.
contact.formNote: Your message goes straight to the YUnited board inbox (yunited@shsg.ch) and is only used to reply to you — nothing else.
contact.plainEmail: Prefer plain email? Write to yunited@shsg.ch — or DM us on Instagram.
